content.text: I mean... it would mean I'm putting my own wants above my family's needs, right? Like, I'm the one who — we both work hard, but I do a lot of the carrying, the logistics, the emotional load of it all, and I *know* that, and I think that's part of why I feel like I don't have the right to just... opt out for a week. So if it's selfish, it means I'm not as good a person as I'm trying to be. I guess that's what I'm scared of.
